subtitle: Doors opening — build the pipeline

planetInfluences.summary: Opens doors and widens the pipeline

tropicalReading.body: Today is expansion — quiet openings with real background pressure. Use it to build structural leverage for the move: tighten documents, clean money assumptions, and keep conversations practical. For Capricorn Rising, this 12th-House annual profection stays a foundation/preparation year; Moon trine Neptune sharpens intuition but blurs timing. Work the valuation cycle, not a predetermined one: protect the 2nd-House North Node self-valuation arc, ignore hype, and formalize later.

traditionalReading.body:
Today is expansion with discipline — open the door, sharpen the terms, and keep the move reversible. The month profects to the 9th whole-sign house, Virgo; Mercury is lord of the month, strong in domicile and exaltation, and supported by Mercury sextile Mercury, so use writing, study, admin review, and outreach. Jupiter sextile Mars gives push, but Mars is out of sect; act, do not force. This is a green light with a brake pedal.

Moon today — Moon in Virgo, your 9th whole-sign house. Prioritize clean judgment, document review, learning, and travel/admin details; ignore vague opinions and fix the part of the plan that proves useful today.

vedicReading.body:
Today is Expansion — use the opening for outreach, document cleanup, and move logistics, then stop before committing weight. Mercury sextile Mercury favors clear asks and clean sequencing; Venus with Ketu says prune value leaks and old attachments. The External Manifestation Windows build toward Aug 12-Sep 5, so treat today as staging, not finalization. For Sagittarius Lagna, direction matters more than mood; friction around comfort or fairness is noise.

Moon today — Moon in Leo, your 9th house, nakshatra Purva Phalguni pada 2. Use the social and creative lift to open doors, refine the pitch, and avoid turning a useful conversation into a premature commitment.

baziReading.body: Today is Yi-Chou Resource over quiet Ox — expansion through preparation. Move visibly, use the Mang Zhong Jia-Wu month to build pipeline, documents, and introductions. Yin Wood Resource feeds your Ding Fire day master; Ox Earth turns it into Output, favoring useful production over noise. This is a lamp fed by dry kindling, useful for focused work and dangerous when multiplied. Keep the Wu-Zi Da Yun, Rabbit core, and 2026 Horse peer-fire field disciplined: do not turn competition into compulsion or scatter into too many parallel fires.

tarotCard.name: Four of Swords
tarotCard.body: Four of Swords — stability in clarity; consolidate and hold what you've built. Today is Expansion: build leverage and document the move, but keep formal commitments for later. Jupiter carries the field, and Saturn is the constraint to respect. Moon trine Neptune is the sharpest aspect today — let it set the operating language. The Jupiter Return sits 22 days out, so treat today as part of that setup.

tropicalMonthly.body: Dominant influence: Capricorn Rising in a 12th-House annual profection, so this month is preparation, pipeline, and structural leverage, not public finality. The Sun leaves late Gemini and enters Cancer on June 21, shifting attention from work systems into agreements, clients, collaborators, and the terms under which you are seen. This is a valuation cycle you work, not a predetermined one: the 2nd-House North Node arc asks you to price contribution, protect bandwidth, and build ownership instead of chasing approval. Jupiter return pressure builds toward July 12, supporting openings, but Saturn/Pluto background pressure keeps the test practical: document, negotiate, refine. July 16 brings career-meets-sensitivity material into view; treat it as information about competence and exposure, not identity. Mars-Venus is friction looking for a build, not a fight.

traditionalMonthly.body: The dominant frame is Jupiter as lord of the year in a 12th-house Sagittarius year: build quietly, reduce waste, and prepare commitments that can carry weight after late August 2026. Until around June 30, the monthly profection is the 9th whole-sign house, Virgo, with Mercury as lord of the month; Mercury is natally in Virgo, in domicile and exaltation, so this month favors analysis, writing, study, planning, and precise judgment. Mercury is a sharp drafting table this month: useful for plans, terms, evidence, and revisions, useless for theatrical certainty. Current support is real: Mercury’s sextile to the lord of the month helps coordination, and Mars trine Mercury gives execution, but Mars is out of sect in a day chart, so do not let speed become irritation. Around June 30, the handoff to Libra and Venus shifts focus toward 10th-house visibility; formalize later, prepare now.

vedicMonthly.body: Dominant frame: Moon–Venus–Jupiter supports relationship, value, and opportunity-building, but Sagittarius Lagna is still carrying Sade Sati / Small Panoti pressure through June 2, 2027, so pace beats force. From June 20–30, use the active pivot window to build pipeline, clarify terms, and separate real leverage from noise. The Moon starts in Purva Phalguni, then cycles all 27 nakshatras, so treat mood spikes as timing signals, not strategy. Saturn is the quiet edit, not the loud cut. What matters: career authority, property, cash-flow, and agreements; what does not: reopening stale value disputes. Build now, formalize later; the strongest External Manifestation Window is August 12–September 5, 2026.

baziMonthly.body: Your dominant frame is 戊子 Wu-Zi Da Yun: Output under Power pressure, so this month is for building leverage, not forcing closure. Today, 2026-06-20, 乙丑 Yi-Chou gives Resource feeding Output; it favors research, documentation, pipeline repair, and turning ideas into usable structure. 甲午 Jia-Wu month, opened by Mang Zhong, adds Yang Wood Resource into Horse Fire, amplifying your Ding Fire through peers, visibility, and competition. Move visibly, but do not turn competition into compulsion or scatter into too many parallel fires; heat becomes burnout when every spark demands a project. On 2026-07-07, Xiao Shu shifts the field to 乙未 Yi-Wei: Resource plus Earth Output, better for packaging, proof, and commitments you can carry. Jul 7-Sep 7 is the year’s tight stack, with Jul 12 as a visibility checkpoint; build now, formalize after late August.

tacticalSlots.note: Year branch repeats in 2026 — drive and visibility run hot
Natal month AND hour branch — structural pressure is real
Your true core branch — finesse, curation, clean expression over force
Mnemonic overlay only — not a natal pillar (literal hour branch is Monkey)

consensus.primaryAction: Codify the deal terms and build the mechanism that makes them repeatable.

todaysInsight: Build leverage and document your value. Keep commitments provisional while you expand the pipeline.

opportunity: Jupiter is lord of the year (benefic regime)
approaching benefic window: Jupiter return — chapter reset (22d)
pressure: Sade Sati (Small Panoti) — pressure on foundations
momentum: BaZi Da Yun shift within 87 days
